segment.source: Renders an optional heading and subheadline, then one section per department: the department name above a four-column grid of compact text-only cards with member name and optional role — no photos. Use it for: larger staff rosters grouped by unit, personnel or contact lists ordered by division, organizational overviews from annual reports or intranet pages. Prefer 'Organization Chart' for hierarchy tiers; use 'Team Section' when members have portraits and bios.
